segments.script_text: Bienvenidos reptiles al venenoso Culebrisa, soy Cobradoriga, y hoy hay veneno pa rato.
El Chapo Guzmán escribió una carta pidiendo que lo extraditen a México desde su celda en Estados Unidos. No mames, el señor extraña su madriguera.

news_source.title: ‘El Chapo’ Guzmán pide su extradición a México

prompts.image: A weathered anthropomorphic kingsnake with a thick mustache and a worn prison jumpsuit, handwriting a letter with his scaly claws inside a dark stone cell with iron bars, dramatic single light beam from above, cinematic and semi-realistic style, vertical 9:16 composition. The cell walls are carved with serpentine patterns and scale textures, giving the space an oppressive reptilian atmosphere.
prompts.video: A massive serpentine courthouse filled with anthropomorphic snake lawyers and judges in robes, a giant glowing parchment letter floats in the center of the room displaying serpent-script text, shocked snake spectators fill the gallery with wide slit-pupil eyes, dramatic golden and green lighting from above, semi-realistic cinematic vertical composition. The architecture features undulating arches and scale-patterned walls evoking a grand reptilian hall of justice.

segments.script_text: Emiratos Árabes Unidos interceptó tres misiles lanzados desde Irán, y eso con alto el fuego supuestamente en vigor. Qué pinche forma de hacer las paces.

news_source.title: Emiratos Árabes Unidos intercepta tres misiles procedentes de Irán pese al alto el fuego en vigor

prompts.image: Three enormous serpentine missiles shaped like coiling snakes with glowing red eyes streak across a golden desert night sky, launched from a distant horizon toward the glittering snake-scale skyline of a futuristic UAE city, dramatic fiery orange and deep blue lighting, cinematic semi-realistic style, vertical 9:16 composition. The city towers are designed with spiraling scales and curved reptilian architecture that shimmers under the threat of incoming fire.
prompts.video: Sleek anthropomorphic cobra soldiers in high-tech scale-patterned armor operate giant glowing radar screens shaped like serpent hoods, interceptor serpent-missiles launch upward exploding three incoming threats in brilliant flashes of light above the city, a fourth explosion visible far out over a dark digital ocean on their screens, tense green-tinted war-room lighting, vertical semi-realistic cinematic composition. The control room walls pulse with bioluminescent snake-scale patterns as alarms flash gold and red.

segments.script_text: Las remesas de Estados Unidos a México ya viajan más por aplicaciones que en efectivo, gracias a las fintech y sus comisiones más bajas. La muda de piel tecnológica llegó al dinero migrante.

news_source.title: Las remesas digitales desplazan al efectivo en las transferencias de EU a México

prompts.image: A tired anthropomorphic rattlesnake migrant worker in dusty clothes holds a glowing smartphone with a snake-scale textured interface, digitally sending a swirling stream of golden coins stamped with serpent faces across a luminous digital map stretching from a US city to a Mexican town below, warm golden and teal lighting, cinematic semi-realistic style, vertical 9:16 composition. The background shows two contrasting skylines connected by a glowing serpentine data stream flowing through the air.
prompts.video: A cheerful anthropomorphic boa constrictor grandmother in a colorful Mexican village receives a glowing notification on her scale-patterned smartphone, golden digital coins materializing in her hands while a crowd of excited snake neighbors gathers around her, festive warm orange and green market lighting with papel picado made of tiny snake skins hanging overhead, semi-realistic cinematic vertical composition. Behind them a vibrant market stall displays goods priced in serpent-currency, celebrating the arrival of digital remesas.

segments.script_text: Eso fue todo reptiles, nos vemos mañana, sigan deslizándose.
